title: Evangelion on CollegeHumor
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion on CollegeHumor?             Quote Post by cody727kirby » Wed Jan 26, 2011 11:00 pm This is a few months old, but I think worth mentioning, especially since CollegeHumor has such a large number of viewers. http://www.collegehumor.com/video:1944172 Rei costume! Pretty cool finding this reference on such a popular website. Sorry if this has been mentioned before.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Jan 27, 2011 11:37 am The Rei cosplay was meh, I liked the cardboard evangelion custome more. Cardboard shoulder pylons lol

[]: Re: Evangelion on CollegeHumor?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 27, 2011 3:03 pm cody727kirby wrote: This is a few months old, but I think worth mentioning, especially since CollegeHumor has such a large number of viewers. http://www.collegehumor.com/video:1944172 Rei costume! Pretty cool finding this reference on such a popular website. Sorry if this has been mentioned before.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Fri Jan 28, 2011 12:15 am Very funny stuff. But honestly, I don't think I've seen any cosplayer get Rei's blue hair the right shade of blue. But that only adds to the humor in the video.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jan 28, 2011 4:03 pm So someone at College Humor is one of us. Cool beans.
